name: Closed-Loop Knowledge Dynamics: An Operational Framework for Saturation and Escape
summary: arXiv:2607.14185v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Feedback-driven loops support iterative improvement in large language models, reinforcement learning, and autonomous discovery, yet their gains oft...
description: arXiv:2607.14185v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Feedback-driven loops support iterative improvement in large language models, reinforcement learning, and autonomous discovery, yet their gains often diminish under repeated internal feedback. We study why closed-loop knowledge systems saturate and what external information can move them beyond their current attractors. We introduce a three-leve...
author: Xuening Wu, Shan Yu, Shenqin Yin
